prestazioni: LS1 (5.7L Gen III V8) engine swap to LS7 (7.0L Gen IV V8) with forged internals: Mahle 2618 alloy pistons (11.0:1 compression), Callies Compstar crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ARP head studs. Paired with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (236/242 duration, .624/.624 lift, 114 LSA) for high-RPM powerband retention.

Forced induction via Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with a custom Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve. Intercooled with a PWR USA 4.5-core bar-and-plate intercooler (1000hp-capable) and custom 3-inch aluminum piping with Vibrant Performance silicone couplers.

Fuel system overhaul: Fore Innovations dual-pump fuel surge tank (2x Walbro 450LPH pumps), Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (1700cc/min), and a Holley Dominator ECU with custom LS7-specific tune by Lund Racing. Exhaust system features 1.75-inch primary headers from Stainless Works (4-into-1 merge collectors) and a 3-inch dual MagnaFlow Competition Series cat-back with non-resonated mufflers.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter, and rear diffuser) paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon (LS7-specific scoop). Rear wing is a custom 3D Carbon ACR-style duckbill spoiler with adjustable angle mounts.

Suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 80mm-100mm drop) with custom valving for LS7-powered weight distribution. Polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full kit) and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Wheel setup: Forgeline GA3R 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x12 +40 rear with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (LS7-specific side bolsters) with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage from Autopower (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (FireBottle 5lb Halon). Steering wheel is a NRG Innovations R3 (350mm, suede) with quick-release hub. Gauges: AEM X-Series 7-inch digital dash with wideband AFR, boost, and oil pressure sensors.
